text:
(14) There shall be annexed to the return filed with the Registrar in Form No. SH.11, a certificate in
Form No. SH.15 signed by two directors of the company including the managing director, if any,
certifying that the buy-back of securities has been made in compliance with the provisions of the Act and
the rules made thereunder.
sentence_window:
(13) The company, after the completion of the buy-back under these rules, shall file with the Registrar,
and in case of a listed company with the Registrar and the Securities and Exchange Board of India, a
return in the Form No. SH.11 along with the fee . (14) There shall be annexed to the return filed with the Registrar in Form No. SH.11, a certificate in
Form No. SH.15 signed by two directors of the company including the managing director, if any,
certifying that the buy-back of securities has been made in compliance with the provisions of the Act and
the rules made thereunder. 1. Proviso inserted by the Companies (Share Capital and Debentures) Amendment Rules,
2016, w.e.f.
